text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Did you leave this on my desk, Ayabe? It was
you, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It must be a birthday present... I knew it! Thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's nothing special. Only a heated eye mask.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I really appreciate it! I'm going to try it out
tonight!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Seriously... It's just a mask that I always use.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That means you must really like it! And you're kind enough to share it with me! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But, Ayabe, you put so much thought into a
present for me. That makes me really happy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I bet you knew my eyes have been tired from
watching racing videos nonstop. Hehe, ehehe...
